from collections import namedtuple

Point = namedtuple("Point", ["x", "y", "z"])
Record = namedtuple("Record", ["id", "name", "value", "timestamp"])

def process_points(points: list) -> list:
    results = []
    for p in points:
        point = Point(p[0], p[1], p[2])
        results.append(point.x + point.y + point.z)
    return results

def get_record_values(records: list) -> list:
    values = []
    for r in records:
        record = Record(r["id"], r["name"], r["value"], r["timestamp"])
        values.append(record.value)
    return values

def format_record(record: Record) -> str:
    return f"ID: {record.id}, Name: {record.name}, Value: {record.value}"

def compare_points(p1: Point, p2: Point) -> bool:
    return p1.x == p2.x and p1.y == p2.y and p1.z == p2.z
